name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is a global technology company providing intelligent solutions from edge to cloud. Key offerings include HPE GreenLake hybrid cloud platform, AI-driven networking (including Juniper Networks portfolio), HPE Cray EX supercomputers, HPE ProLiant servers, storage solutions, and financial services. HPE serves small-to-large enterprises and government entities, focusing on networking, cloud, AI infrastructure, and data management with a platform-based, software-and-services-enriched business model.

products.name: HPE GreenLake
products.description: Hybrid cloud platform delivering pay-per-use consumption and AI-driven experience across public clouds, data centers, colocation, and edge.

products.name: HPE Cray EX
products.description: Market-leading supercomputing systems supporting large-scale AI and HPC workloads.

products.name: HPE ProLiant
products.description: Rack-scale servers delivering accelerated computing for traditional and AI workloads including training and inferencing.

products.name: HPE Private Cloud AI
products.description: Turnkey AI factory solution for sovereign and enterprise customers targeting AI infrastructure needs.

products.name: Juniper Networks AI-native networking portfolio
products.description: Full networking technology stack enabling secure, AI-driven networking solutions acquired via Juniper Networks acquisition.

products.name: HPE Financial Services
products.description: Financial services business helping customers unlock financial capacity to acquire HPE solutions.

products.name: HPE Storage Solutions
products.description: Proprietary HPE-developed storage solutions enhancing profitability and reducing reliance on third-party products.

partnerships.description: HPE holds shares in H3C and is contemplating disposition of those shares.
